citation: FinanceRateCalc Research. (2026). FRC Mortgage Denial Taxonomy. financeratecalc.com/decision-taxonomy.json. CC BY 4.0.

agency_rule.description: Denial caused by federal minimum standards (FHA, VA, Fannie Mae). Borrower must address underlying issue.
agency_rule.action: Address underlying issue before reapplying. Timeline varies by issue type.

lender_overlay.description: Denial caused by lender-specific rules stricter than agency minimums. Same borrower may be approved elsewhere today.
lender_overlay.action: Apply at lender category without this overlay. No wait required.

documentation.description: Denial caused by insufficient or unacceptable documentation of otherwise qualifying profile.
documentation.action: Gather required documentation. Timeline: 30-90 days typically.

property.description: Denial caused by property type, condition, or valuation issues.
property.action: Renegotiate price, different property, or portfolio lender for property type.

ecoa_codes.01: Income insufficient → often DTI overlay (compare to FHA 57%)
ecoa_codes.02: Insufficient credit file → agency rule, thin file needs building
ecoa_codes.03: Unable to verify credit → may be overlay, manual UW often available
ecoa_codes.08: Length of employment → often overlay (agency requires total 2yr, not at current job)
ecoa_codes.10: Temporary employment → often overlay for SSDI/1099 which agencies accept
ecoa_codes.14: Credit score below minimum → most often overlay (FHA: 580, Conv: 620)
ecoa_codes.18: Excessive obligations → most common, often overlay vs FHA 57% max
ecoa_codes.22: Derogatory public record → agency rule, timing matters

overlay_detection_rule: IF borrower_value >= agency_minimum AND borrower_value < lender_threshold THEN classification = LENDER_OVERLAY ELSE IF borrower_value < agency_minimum THEN classification = AGENCY_RULE
